planSteps.description: Navigate to /api/mock-login?secret=mantiz_e2e_bypass_2026 to authenticate the session
Verify the Settings page is visible with a Webhook section containing a URL input field with id='webhook-url-input'
Verify a button with id='webhook-test-button' is visible in the Webhook section
Click the webhook URL input (id='webhook-url-input'), clear it, and type 'https://webhook.site/test-mantiz'
Click the Save Settings button with id='save-settings-button'
Verify the Save Settings button (id='save-settings-button') now shows the text 'Saved!' confirming the settings were saved
